about.title: About Saheeb
about.subtitle: Your Technology Partner in Oman
about.description: Saheeb is an Oman-registered technology company dedicated to building AI-native products and providing comprehensive B2B services. We specialize in engineering, artificial intelligence, research, digital marketing, and localization services.
about.mission: Our mission is to empower Omani businesses and contribute to the nation's digital transformation in alignment with Oman Vision 2040.

saheebDrive.title: Saheeb Drive
saheebDrive.heroTagline: The Future of Car Buying in Oman
saheebDrive.heroDescription: We're not improving the car market—we're replacing it. AI-first. Trust-built. Completely reimagined from the ground up.
saheebDrive.problemDescription: Oman's car market is broken. Scams, fake listings, price manipulation, wasted weekends. Buyers don't trust sellers. Sellers don't reach buyers. Everyone loses.
saheebDrive.solutionDescription: One conversation. That's all it takes. Tell our AI what you want—in Arabic or English—and we handle everything else. Search, verification, negotiation, paperwork, delivery.
techHighlights: Custom ML models trained on GCC automotive data
Arabic NLP that actually understands dialects
Real-time fraud detection that catches what humans miss
Built on Oman's digital infrastructure from day one

moreComing.title: More Projects
moreComing.description: Saheeb Drive is just the beginning. We're building more AI-powered solutions for Oman. Stay tuned.

faq.title: Questions People Ask
faq.subtitle: The questions buyers and sellers usually need answered before they trust a new marketplace.

items.question: When and where does it launch?
items.answer: We're starting in Muscat, Q3 2026. Waitlist members get early access before the public launch. We'll expand to other cities based on demand.

items.question: Can I sell my car through Saheeb Drive?
items.answer: Yes! Sellers get AI-powered pricing (so you know exactly what your car is worth), professional photos, and access to verified buyers. No more haggling with lowballers.

items.question: How do you verify cars and sellers?
items.answer: We check against ROP records, insurance history, and our own fraud detection system. Suspicious listings get flagged before you ever see them. Only verified sellers make it to the platform.

items.question: What does it cost to use?
items.answer: Browsing and searching is free. We charge a small service fee only when a deal is completed successfully. Sellers pay a listing fee. Full pricing will be announced at launch.

items.question: Is my data safe?
items.answer: We apply strong data protection controls aligned with Omani regulations. Some processing may involve vetted service providers outside Oman with contractual safeguards.

buyer.faqSubtitle: The answers buyers usually want before they trust a new place to search for their next car.

faqItems.question: When and where does it launch?
faqItems.answer: We're starting in Muscat in Q3 2026. Waitlist members get earlier access before the public launch, and we'll expand to other cities based on demand.

faqItems.question: How do you verify cars and sellers?
faqItems.answer: We combine seller verification, fraud checks, vehicle history signals, and platform-level risk flags so buyers see more of the trust story earlier.

faqItems.question: What do I get by joining now?
faqItems.answer: You'll get launch updates, early access before the public rollout, and a faster route into the first Muscat buyer wave.

faqItems.question: What does it cost to use?
faqItems.answer: Browsing and searching will be free. We expect paid services only around successful transactions or optional premium tools, with final pricing shared before launch.

faqItems.question: Is my data safe?
faqItems.answer: We apply strong data protection controls aligned with Omani regulations, and we limit outreach to launch-related product updates you asked for.

seller.faqSubtitle: The questions sellers usually ask before trusting a new marketplace with their next listing.

faqItems.question: Can I sell my car through Saheeb Drive?
faqItems.answer: Yes. We're building the first Muscat seller wave now, and waitlist sellers will get earlier access before public listings open.

faqItems.question: How will pricing guidance work?
faqItems.answer: Sellers will see pricing support built from deeper market context and listing signals so you can price with more confidence before you go live.

faqItems.question: Why does seller verification matter?
faqItems.answer: Verified seller signals help buyers trust listings faster, which should improve response quality and reduce wasted conversations.

faqItems.question: What will I need for launch?
faqItems.answer: We'll guide founding sellers through the first onboarding steps, including listing details, verification requirements, and what to prepare before launch.

faqItems.question: Will there be seller fees?
faqItems.answer: We expect seller pricing to be announced before launch. Joining the waitlist now makes sure you hear those details early.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.metaDescription: Learn how Saheeb collects, uses, and protects your personal data in compliance with Omani privacy regulations.
privacy.subtitle: This Privacy Policy explains how Saheeb collects, uses, and protects your personal information in compliance with Omani data protection regulations.

companyInfo.title: Data Controller
companyInfo.name: SAHEEB TECH VENTURES LLC
companyInfo.address: Registered HQ: Special Economic Zone at Duqm, Al Wusta, Oman · Operational: Muscat, Oman

intro.title: Introduction and Scope
intro.content:
This Privacy Policy applies to all personal data collected through saheeb.com, our mobile applications, and any services we provide (collectively, the "Services"). By using our Services, you acknowledge that you have read and understood this Privacy Policy.

Saheeb is committed to protecting your privacy and handling your personal data in accordance with the laws of the Sultanate of Oman, including applicable data protection regulations. This policy describes our practices regarding the collection, use, storage, and disclosure of your information.

dataController.title: Data Controller Information
dataController.content:
SAHEEB TECH VENTURES LLC (CR 1642589) acts as the data controller for personal data collected through our Services. As data controller, we determine the purposes and means of processing your personal data.

For any questions about this Privacy Policy, our data practices, or to exercise your data rights, contact privacy@saheeb.com.

dataCollection.title: Information We Collect
dataCollection.content:
We collect information in the following categories:

• Contact Information: Name, email address, phone number, and any details you provide when contacting us or submitting forms.

• Waitlist Information: Name, email, phone number, and preferences (such as buyer/seller status for Saheeb Drive).

• Device Information: Browser type, operating system, IP address, device identifiers, and general location data derived from IP address.

• Usage Data: Pages visited, time spent on pages, links clicked, and interaction patterns with our website. We use Google Analytics, Meta Pixel, server-side conversion measurement, and privacy-safe session replay on Saheeb Drive to understand which campaigns, landing pages, and CTA paths lead to visits, waitlist joins, or contact requests. This measurement is configured not to intentionally capture form-field contents such as names, email addresses, phone numbers, or message text.

• Cookies and Similar Technologies: Information collected through cookies, pixels, and similar tracking technologies (see Cookies section below).

• Saheeb Drive Specific Data: If you join the Saheeb Drive waitlist, we collect car preferences, location preferences, and whether you intend to buy or sell vehicles.

We do not collect sensitive personal data such as health information, religious beliefs, or government-issued identification numbers unless specifically required and with your explicit consent.

legalBasis.title: Legal Basis for Processing
legalBasis.content:
We process your personal data based on the following legal grounds under Omani law:

• Consent: When you voluntarily provide information through forms with an explicit consent checkbox, or when you opt-in to marketing communications. You may withdraw consent at any time.

• Legitimate Interests: For business operations, security, fraud prevention, and improving our services, where such interests are not overridden by your rights.

• Contractual Necessity: When processing is necessary to provide services you have requested or to take steps at your request before entering into a contract.

• Legal Obligations: When we are required to process data to comply with Omani laws and regulations, or to respond to lawful requests from authorities.

dataUse.title: How We Use Your Information
dataUse.content:
We use your personal data for the following purposes:

• Service Delivery: To respond to your inquiries, process your requests, and provide our services.

• Communications: To send you service-related notifications and, with your consent, marketing communications about our products and services.

• Improvement: To analyze usage patterns, improve our website and services, and develop new features.

• Security: To protect against fraud, unauthorized access, and other security threats to our services and users.

• Legal Compliance: To comply with applicable laws, regulations, and legal processes in the Sultanate of Oman.

• Business Operations: For internal administration, record-keeping, and business planning purposes.

dataSharing.title: Information Sharing and Disclosure
dataSharing.content:
We do not sell, rent, or trade your personal information to third parties for their marketing purposes.

We may share your information in the following circumstances:

• Service Providers: With trusted third-party service providers who assist us in operating our website, conducting our business, or servicing you, provided they agree to keep your information confidential.

• Analytics and Measurement Providers: We use Google Analytics, Meta Pixel, Meta Conversions API when configured, and Microsoft Clarity for landing-page attribution, conversion measurement, CTA analysis, mobile behavior analysis, and privacy-safe replay of Saheeb Drive journeys.

• Legal Requirements: When required by law, court order, or governmental authority in the Sultanate of Oman, or when we believe disclosure is necessary to protect our rights, your safety, or the safety of others.

• Business Transfers: In connection with a merger, acquisition, or sale of assets, your information may be transferred to the acquiring entity, subject to this Privacy Policy.

• With Your Consent: In any other circumstances where you have provided explicit consent to share your information.

All third parties with whom we share data are contractually obligated to protect your information and use it only for the purposes for which it was shared.

internationalTransfers.title: International Data Transfers
internationalTransfers.content:
Your personal data is processed with an Oman-first approach where feasible. Some operations may involve trusted providers in other jurisdictions (for example, hosting, email delivery, analytics, and operational tooling).

When transfers occur, we implement appropriate safeguards, including:

• Contractual controls with processors and service providers.

• Transfer controls aligned with Omani Personal Data Protection Law requirements.

• Additional consent or approvals where legally required.

Contact privacy@saheeb.com if you need details about specific transfer mechanisms.

dataRetention.title: Data Retention
dataRetention.content:
We retain your personal data only for as long as necessary to fulfill the purposes for which it was collected, or as required by applicable law. Our retention periods are as follows:

• Contact Form Submissions: 2 years from the date of submission, unless an ongoing business relationship exists.

• Waitlist Registrations: Until product launch plus 1 year, or until you request removal.

• Marketing Consent Records: Until consent is withdrawn, plus records retained for 5 years for compliance purposes.

• Website Analytics Data: 26 months in aggregate/anonymized form.

• Legal and Compliance Records: As required by Omani law.

After the retention period expires, we securely delete or anonymize your personal data.

yourRights.title: Your Rights
yourRights.content:
Under Omani Personal Data Protection Law and its Executive Regulation, you have rights including access, rectification, erasure, portability (where applicable), withdrawal of consent, and objection to certain processing activities.

To exercise your rights, contact privacy@saheeb.com. We respond within the legally required timelines (up to 45 days unless law requires otherwise). Identity verification may be required before processing requests.

cookies.title: Cookies and Tracking Technologies
cookies.content:
We use cookies and similar technologies to operate the website, remember preferences, and understand site usage. These include:

• Essential Cookies: Necessary for the website to function properly. These cannot be disabled.

• Attribution and Conversion Measurement: We use Google Analytics, Meta Pixel, Meta Conversions API when configured, and server-side measurement to understand which campaigns or landing pages lead to visits, waitlist joins, and contact requests. This measurement is configured to avoid intentionally sending form-field contents such as your name, email address, phone number, or message.

• Analytics and Measurement Cookies: We use analytics cookies and privacy-safe session replay on public Saheeb pages, including Saheeb Drive, to understand page journeys, CTA clicks, mobile behavior, and conversion friction.

• Preference Cookies: Remember your settings and preferences (such as language choice).

Google Analytics, Meta, and Microsoft Clarity may process limited device, browser, and event information on our behalf and may involve cross-border processing subject to applicable safeguards. We do not intentionally send form fields such as your name, email address, phone number, or message content to these providers.

Most browsers allow you to:

• View cookies stored on your device
• Accept or reject cookies (either all or certain types)
• Delete cookies

childrenPrivacy.title: Children's Privacy
childrenPrivacy.content:
Our Services are not directed at individuals under the age of 18 ("minors"). We do not knowingly collect personal data from minors.

If you are a parent or guardian and believe your child has provided us with personal information without your consent, please contact us immediately at privacy@saheeb.com. If we become aware that we have collected personal data from a minor without parental consent, we will take steps to delete that information promptly.

For Saheeb Drive and other products requiring account creation, users must be 18 years or older.

security.title: Security Measures
security.content:
We implement appropriate technical and organizational measures to protect your personal data against unauthorized access, alteration, disclosure, or destruction. These measures include:

• Encryption: All data transmitted between your device and our servers is encrypted using TLS/SSL protocols.

• Access Controls: Personal data is accessible only to authorized personnel on a need-to-know basis.

• Security Assessments: We conduct regular security reviews and vulnerability assessments.

• Incident Response: We maintain procedures for detecting, reporting, and responding to data security incidents.

While we strive to protect your personal data, no method of transmission over the internet or electronic storage is 100% secure. We cannot guarantee absolute security of your information.

changes.title: Changes to This Policy
changes.content:
We may update this Privacy Policy from time to time to reflect changes in our practices, technology, legal requirements, or other factors.

When we make changes, we will:

• Update the "Last Updated" date at the top of this policy.
• Post the updated policy on our website.
• For material changes that significantly affect your rights, we will provide prominent notice or seek your consent where required by law.

We encourage you to review this Privacy Policy periodically. Your continued use of our Services after changes are posted constitutes your acceptance of the updated policy.

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.content:
If you have questions, concerns, or requests regarding this Privacy Policy or our data practices, please contact us:

Email: privacy@saheeb.com
Entity: SAHEEB TECH VENTURES LLC (CR 1642589)
Registered HQ: Special Economic Zone at Duqm, Al Wusta, Oman
Operational Office: Muscat, Oman

We respond within legally required timelines.

acceptance.title: Agreement to Terms
acceptance.content:
By accessing or using the Saheeb website (saheeb.com), mobile applications, or any of our services (collectively, the "Services"), you agree to be bound by these Terms of Service ("Terms").

If you do not agree to these Terms, you must not access or use our Services.

You must be at least 18 years of age to use our Services. By using our Services, you represent and warrant that you are at least 18 years old and have the legal capacity to enter into these Terms.

These Terms constitute a legally binding agreement between you and Saheeb. We encourage you to print or save a copy of these Terms for your records.

servicesDescription.title: Description of Services
servicesDescription.content:
Saheeb provides technology services including but not limited to:

• Website and Information: Our website provides general information about our company and services. Website content is for informational purposes only.

• Products: Including Saheeb Drive (AI-powered car marketplace, coming soon) and other products we may develop.

• B2B Services: Technology consulting, software development, AI solutions, digital marketing, and localization services.

IMPORTANT: Our Services are provided on an "AS IS" and "AS AVAILABLE" basis. We reserve the right to modify, suspend, or discontinue any part of our Services at any time without prior notice.

Service descriptions on our website are general in nature and do not constitute binding offers. Actual services are subject to separate written agreements.

userAccounts.title: User Accounts
userAccounts.content:
Certain features of our Services may require you to create an account. When creating an account, you agree to:

• Provide accurate, current, and complete information during registration.
• Maintain the security and confidentiality of your account credentials.
• Notify us immediately of any unauthorized access to your account.
• Accept responsibility for all activities that occur under your account.

We reserve the right to suspend or terminate your account at our sole discretion if we believe you have violated these Terms or engaged in fraudulent, abusive, or illegal activity.

You may delete your account at any time by contacting us at contact@saheeb.com.

acceptableUse.title: Acceptable Use Policy
acceptableUse.content:
You agree to use our Services only for lawful purposes and in accordance with these Terms. You must NOT:

• Violate any applicable local, national, or international law or regulation.
• Infringe upon the intellectual property rights of Saheeb or any third party.
• Transmit any malicious code, viruses, or harmful content.
• Attempt to gain unauthorized access to our systems, servers, or networks.
• Interfere with or disrupt the integrity or performance of our Services.
• Use automated systems (bots, scrapers, etc.) to access our Services without permission.
• Impersonate any person or entity, or misrepresent your affiliation.
• Engage in fraudulent, deceptive, or misleading practices.
• Collect or harvest personal data of other users without consent.
• Use our Services to send spam or unsolicited communications.

We reserve the right to investigate and take appropriate legal action against anyone who violates these prohibitions.

intellectualProperty.title: Intellectual Property Rights
intellectualProperty.content:
All content, features, and functionality of our Services are owned by Saheeb and are protected by intellectual property laws of the Sultanate of Oman and international conventions.

This includes but is not limited to:

• Trademarks: "Saheeb," "Saheeb Drive," our logo, and any other marks are trademarks of Saheeb. You may not use these marks without our prior written permission.

• Content: All text, graphics, images, videos, software, and other materials on our website.

• Technology: Our proprietary software, algorithms, AI models, and technical infrastructure.

Limited License: We grant you a limited, non-exclusive, non-transferable, revocable license to access and use our Services for personal, non-commercial purposes, subject to these Terms.

You may NOT:
• Copy, modify, or create derivative works from our content.
• Distribute, publicly display, or publicly perform our content.
• Reverse engineer, decompile, or disassemble our software.
• Remove or alter any proprietary notices or labels.

thirdPartyContent.title: Third-Party Links and Content
thirdPartyContent.content:
Our Services may contain links to third-party websites, services, or content that are not owned or controlled by Saheeb.

We do not:
• Endorse or assume responsibility for any third-party content.
• Control the content, privacy policies, or practices of third parties.
• Guarantee the accuracy, reliability, or completeness of third-party information.

Your interactions with third parties are solely between you and the third party. We encourage you to review the terms and privacy policies of any third-party services you access through our platform.

Saheeb shall not be liable for any damage or loss caused by your reliance on any third-party content or services.

disclaimerWarranties.title: Disclaimer of Warranties
disclaimerWarranties.content:
TO THE MAXIMUM EXTENT PERMITTED BY OMANI LAW, OUR SERVICES ARE PROVIDED "AS IS" AND "AS AVAILABLE" WITHOUT ANY WARRANTIES OF ANY KIND, WHETHER EXPRESS, IMPLIED, OR STATUTORY.

WE SPECIFICALLY DISCLAIM ALL WARRANTIES INCLUDING BUT NOT LIMITED TO:

• MERCHANTABILITY: No warranty that our Services are fit for sale or commercial use.

• FITNESS FOR A PARTICULAR PURPOSE: No warranty that our Services will meet your specific requirements.

• NON-INFRINGEMENT: No warranty that our Services do not infringe any third-party rights.

• ACCURACY: No warranty that information on our website is accurate, complete, or current.

• AVAILABILITY: No warranty of uninterrupted, timely, secure, or error-free service.

• RESULTS: No warranty regarding any results from using our Services.

Any reliance you place on information provided through our Services is strictly at your own risk.

limitationLiability.title: Limitation of Liability
limitationLiability.content:
TO THE MAXIMUM EXTENT PERMITTED BY OMANI LAW:

Saheeb, its directors, employees, agents, partners, and affiliates shall NOT be liable for any:

• Indirect, incidental, special, consequential, or punitive damages.
• Loss of profits, revenue, data, or business opportunities.
• Damages arising from your use or inability to use our Services.
• Damages arising from any content posted by users or third parties.
• Damages arising from unauthorized access to your data.

OUR TOTAL LIABILITY TO YOU FOR ALL CLAIMS ARISING FROM OR RELATING TO THESE TERMS OR OUR SERVICES SHALL NOT EXCEED THE GREATER OF:

(a) The amount you paid to Saheeb in the 12 months preceding the claim, or
(b) OMR 100 (One Hundred Omani Rials).

These limitations apply regardless of the theory of liability (contract, tort, negligence, strict liability, or otherwise) and even if we have been advised of the possibility of such damages.

Some jurisdictions do not allow the exclusion of certain warranties or limitations of liability. In such cases, our liability shall be limited to the maximum extent permitted by applicable law.

indemnification.title: Indemnification
indemnification.content:
You agree to indemnify, defend, and hold harmless Saheeb and its officers, directors, employees, agents, affiliates, and partners from and against any and all claims, liabilities, damages, losses, costs, and expenses (including reasonable legal fees) arising from or relating to:

• Your use of or access to our Services.
• Your violation of these Terms.
• Your violation of any applicable law or regulation.
• Any content you submit, post, or transmit through our Services.
• Your infringement of any third-party rights, including intellectual property rights.
• Any dispute between you and any third party.

We reserve the right, at your expense, to assume the exclusive defense and control of any matter for which you are required to indemnify us, and you agree to cooperate with our defense of such claims.

governingLaw.title: Governing Law and Jurisdiction
governingLaw.content:
These Terms shall be governed by and construed in accordance with the laws of the Sultanate of Oman, without regard to its conflict of law provisions.

Any dispute arising out of or relating to these Terms or our Services shall be subject to the exclusive jurisdiction of the courts located in Muscat, Sultanate of Oman.

You hereby:

• Consent to the personal jurisdiction of such courts.
• Waive any objection to venue in such courts.
• Waive any claim that such courts constitute an inconvenient forum.

Notwithstanding the foregoing, Saheeb may seek injunctive or other equitable relief in any court of competent jurisdiction to protect its intellectual property rights.

disputeResolution.title: Dispute Resolution
disputeResolution.content:
Before initiating any formal legal proceedings, you agree to first attempt to resolve any dispute with Saheeb through informal negotiation.

Informal Resolution: Contact us at legal@saheeb.com with a description of your concern. We will attempt to resolve the matter within 30 days.

Arbitration: If informal resolution is unsuccessful, any dispute shall be resolved through binding arbitration administered under the rules of Oman Commercial Arbitration in Muscat. The arbitration shall be conducted in English (or Arabic upon mutual agreement).

Class Action Waiver: YOU AGREE THAT ANY DISPUTE RESOLUTION PROCEEDINGS WILL BE CONDUCTED ONLY ON AN INDIVIDUAL BASIS AND NOT IN A CLASS, CONSOLIDATED, OR REPRESENTATIVE ACTION.

Small Claims: Notwithstanding the above, either party may bring an individual action in small claims court for disputes within the court's jurisdictional limits.

forceMajeure.title: Force Majeure
forceMajeure.content:
Saheeb shall not be liable for any failure or delay in performing our obligations under these Terms where such failure or delay results from events beyond our reasonable control ("Force Majeure Events").

Force Majeure Events include but are not limited to:

• Natural disasters (earthquakes, floods, storms, etc.)
• Acts of war, terrorism, or civil unrest
• Government actions, laws, or regulations
• Epidemics, pandemics, or public health emergencies
• Power outages or telecommunications failures
• Cyberattacks or system failures beyond our control
• Labor disputes or strikes

If a Force Majeure Event continues for more than 60 days, either party may terminate these Terms without liability.

severability.title: Severability and Waiver
severability.content:
Severability: If any provision of these Terms is found to be invalid, illegal, or unenforceable by a court of competent jurisdiction, such provision shall be modified to the minimum extent necessary to make it valid and enforceable, or if modification is not possible, shall be severed from these Terms. The remaining provisions shall continue in full force and effect.

No Waiver: Our failure to enforce any right or provision of these Terms shall not constitute a waiver of such right or provision. Any waiver must be in writing and signed by an authorized representative of Saheeb.

Entire Agreement: These Terms, together with our Privacy Policy and any other agreements expressly incorporated by reference, constitute the entire agreement between you and Saheeb regarding our Services.

Assignment: You may not assign or transfer these Terms or your rights hereunder without our prior written consent. Saheeb may assign these Terms without restriction.

changes.title: Changes to Terms
changes.content:
We reserve the right to modify these Terms at any time at our sole discretion.

When we make changes:

• We will update the "Last Updated" date at the top of these Terms.
• We will post the revised Terms on our website.
• For material changes, we may provide additional notice (such as a prominent notice on our website or email notification to registered users).

Your continued use of our Services after the revised Terms are posted constitutes your acceptance of the changes. If you do not agree to the modified Terms, you must discontinue use of our Services.

We encourage you to review these Terms periodically to stay informed of any updates.

contact.title: Contact Information
contact.content:
If you have any questions about these Terms of Service, please contact us:

General Inquiries: contact@saheeb.com
Legal Inquiries: legal@saheeb.com
Address: Muscat, Sultanate of Oman

We aim to respond to all inquiries within a reasonable timeframe.

saheebDrive.title: Saheeb Drive: Product-Specific Terms
saheebDrive.intro: The following additional terms apply specifically to Saheeb Drive, our AI-powered car marketplace. These terms supplement and are in addition to the general Terms of Service above.

platformDescription.title: Platform Description
platformDescription.content:
Saheeb Drive is an AI-powered car marketplace that connects car buyers and sellers in Oman. The platform provides:

• AI-assisted car search and matching
• Listing services for sellers
• Verification and fraud detection tools
• Transaction facilitation services

IMPORTANT: Saheeb Drive operates as a PLATFORM ONLY. We are NOT a party to any transaction between buyers and sellers. We do not own, sell, or purchase vehicles.

userResponsibilities.title: User Responsibilities
userResponsibilities.content:
Sellers agree to:
• Provide accurate and truthful information about vehicles listed.
• Ensure they have legal authority to sell the vehicle.
• Comply with all applicable Omani laws regarding vehicle sales and transfers.
• Respond promptly to buyer inquiries.
• Complete ROP vehicle transfer procedures properly.

Buyers agree to:
• Verify vehicle information independently before purchase.
• Conduct physical inspections of vehicles before finalizing transactions.
• Comply with all applicable Omani laws regarding vehicle purchases.
• Arrange appropriate insurance and registration.

All users must verify information against official ROP (Royal Oman Police) records.

platformRole.title: Saheeb Drive's Role
platformRole.content:
Saheeb Drive provides:

• Information services: AI-powered search, matching, and recommendations.
• Verification assistance: Cross-referencing with available databases (informational only, not guaranteed).
• Fraud detection: AI-based detection of suspicious listings (not 100% accurate).
• Transaction facilitation: Tools to help complete transactions (optional services).

Saheeb Drive does NOT:

• Guarantee the accuracy of any listing information.
• Warrant the condition, history, or legality of any vehicle.
• Guarantee transaction completion or satisfaction.
• Assume responsibility for buyer-seller disputes.
• Provide legal, financial, or mechanical advice.

feesPayments.title: Fees and Payments
feesPayments.content:
Saheeb Drive fee structure (to be announced at launch) may include:

• Listing fees for sellers
• Service fees upon successful transaction completion
• Premium feature subscriptions
• Transaction processing fees

All fees are non-refundable unless otherwise specified. Payment processing is handled by third-party payment providers subject to their own terms.

Escrow services, if offered, are provided by licensed third-party escrow providers. Saheeb Drive does not hold funds directly.

Full pricing details will be published before the platform launch.

listingStandards.title: Listing Standards
listingStandards.content:
All vehicle listings must:

• Contain accurate and truthful information.
• Include genuine photographs of the actual vehicle.
• Disclose known defects, damage, or issues.
• Comply with Omani vehicle regulations.
• Not advertise stolen, illegally imported, or encumbered vehicles.

Saheeb Drive reserves the right to:

• Remove listings that violate these standards without notice.
• Suspend or terminate accounts of repeat violators.
• Report suspected illegal activity to authorities.
• Modify listing content for clarity or compliance (with notice to seller).

verificationServices.title: Verification Services
verificationServices.content:
Saheeb Drive provides verification assistance through:

• AI-based analysis of listing information.
• Cross-referencing with available public databases.
• Historical data analysis where available.
• User verification processes.

LIMITATIONS:

• Verification is INFORMATIONAL ONLY and not guaranteed.
• AI systems may produce errors or miss issues.
• Database information may be incomplete or outdated.
• Verification does not replace independent due diligence.

Users MUST independently verify all information through official channels including ROP vehicle records, licensed mechanics, and insurance providers before completing any transaction.

disclaimers.title: Saheeb Drive Disclaimers
disclaimers.content:
TO THE MAXIMUM EXTENT PERMITTED BY LAW, SAHEEB DRIVE AND SAHEEB:

• Make no representations or warranties about any vehicle listed.
• Assume no responsibility for vehicle condition, history, or legality.
• Are not liable for disputes between buyers and sellers.
• Are not liable for failed transactions or deal breakdowns.
• Are not liable for inaccurate listing information provided by users.
• Are not liable for any loss or damage resulting from platform use.
• Are not responsible for pricing accuracy or market valuations.
• Are not responsible for delivery, inspection, or transfer issues.

By using Saheeb Drive, you acknowledge that:

• Vehicle transactions carry inherent risks.
• You are solely responsible for your due diligence.
• Physical inspection by a qualified mechanic is strongly recommended.
• All transactions are between buyers and sellers directly.
• Saheeb Drive is a facilitator, not a party to transactions.

b2bDisclaimer.title: B2B Services Disclaimer
b2bDisclaimer.content:
Information About Our B2B Services:

The service descriptions on our website are for general informational purposes only and do not constitute binding contractual offers.

• All B2B engagements (technology consulting, software development, AI solutions, digital marketing, localization services) require separate written agreements.

• Terms, pricing, deliverables, and timelines vary by project and are negotiated individually.

• No binding commitment is created by browsing our website or expressing interest in our services.

• Actual service scope and terms are governed exclusively by signed contracts between Saheeb and the client.

• Website content including timelines, capabilities, and outcomes are illustrative only.

For B2B inquiries, please contact us at contact@saheeb.com to discuss your specific requirements.

notFound.title: Page Not Found
notFound.description: The page you're looking for doesn't exist or has been moved.

generic.title: Something Went Wrong
generic.description: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again later.

validation.email: Invalid email - check for a missing dot
validation.phone: Enter a real phone number, including the country code if needed
